from __future__ import annotations

from contextlib import contextmanager
from typing import Iterator


class Lock:
    def __init__(self) -> None:
        self.held = False

    def acquire(self) -> None:
        self.held = True

    def release(self) -> None:
        self.held = False


@contextmanager
def _holding(lock: Lock) -> Iterator[None]:
    lock.acquire()
    try:
        yield
    finally:
        lock.release()


def repeated_try_finally_release_pattern_not_extracted_negative(lock: Lock) -> str:
    with _holding(lock):
        return "done"
